tests.title: Fetch and parse valid discovery document
tests.given: A reachable issuer with a valid .well-known/openid-configuration
tests.then: Returned metadata contains all required fields with correct types

tests.title: Validate all required fields present
tests.given: A discovery document missing zero required fields
tests.then: Validation passes and all seven required fields are accessible

tests.title: Detect issuer mismatch
tests.given: A discovery document whose issuer differs from the requested issuer

tests.title: Cache hit on second fetch within TTL
tests.when: Discovery is invoked again before the TTL expires
tests.then: No HTTP request is made and the cached document is returned

tests.title: Cache miss after TTL expiry
tests.given: A cached discovery document whose TTL has expired
tests.then: A new HTTP request is made and the cache is refreshed

tests.title: Handle HTTP error (404, 500)
tests.given: An issuer whose discovery endpoint returns HTTP 404 or 500
tests.then: A transport/HTTP error is raised with the status code

tests.title: Handle invalid JSON response
tests.given: An issuer whose discovery endpoint returns a non-JSON body

tests.title: Handle missing required field
tests.given: A discovery document that omits one or more required fields
tests.then: A validation error is raised identifying the missing field(s)

tests.title: Ignore unknown fields in discovery document
tests.given: A discovery document containing extra fields not defined in the spec
tests.then: Extra fields are ignored (not rejected) and required fields remain accessible

tests.title: Require HTTPS issuer URL
tests.given: An issuer URL using http:// (not HTTPS)
tests.when: Discovery is invoked in production mode
tests.then: An error is raised indicating HTTPS is required (configurable for development)
